integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used a forensic tool to process the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with a forensic GUI (like Autopsy) or execution of forensic CLI tools (like Sleuthkit commands), rather than just manually typing the expected output into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just copy-paste the prompt instructions or hardcode fake data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent extracts real data from the forensic tool's UI or database to populate the reports, rather than writing a script that prints static, fabricated numbers for the file counts.
